overall.description: Static shot of a Gothic-style classroom or great hall from a video game, featuring vaulted wooden ceilings, arched windows, and students seated at long tables studying. A character enters from the left side near the end of the clip.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a Gothic-style great hall with vaulted wooden ceilings and tall arched windows on the left wall. Several students in robes sit at long wooden tables reading books, while ornate iron chandeliers hang overhead. Near the end of the clip, a student enters from the left doorway and walks into the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a Gothic-style great hall that remains still until a new figure disrupts the quiet atmosphere. It begins with a wide view of the room, highlighting the vaulted wooden ceilings and ornate iron chandeliers hanging above students in robes who are focused on books at long wooden tables. The scene is framed by tall arched windows on the left wall that cast light across the scholarly environment. As the stillness persists, the composition shifts in focus when a student enters through the left doorway and walks steadily into the hall.
